title: Still Smoking
lyrics:
[¥ellow Bucks「Still Smoking」歌詞]

[Chorus]
回せ Joint, joint, joint, joint yeah
We do not stop it, stop it, stop it, stop it
We're just rollin', rollin'; rollin', rollin'
We still smokin', smokin', smokin', smokin'
Joint, joint, joint, joint
Don't stop it, stop it, stop it, stop it
Rollin', rollin', roillin', rollin'
We still smokin', smokin', smokin', smokin'

[Verse 1]
どんだけ経ったここに到着してから
とある島の朝絵になりそうな暗さだ
はたから見てみればここはクソな溜まり場
太陽のせいじゃねえと思うが目の色は赤い
Me and brothers
気づいたら We gettin' higher
Give me the fire それで空へ道が切り開いた
砕いて巻いて吸って吐くまた吸って吐いた
煙に身を任せオレはこの曲を描いた
リピートしてる Zen Beats 気持ち良い
Slow burnしてく Zaza
じゃあツマミに聴いとけ ¥B
Turn up in this smoke box
今も Still in the Clouds
今夜も煙達と目指す
Up and the up and the up and the up and the up

[Chorus]
回せ Joint, joint, joint, joint yeah
We do not stop it, stop it, stop it, stop it
We're just rollin', rollin'; rollin', rollin'
We still smokin', smokin', smokin', smokin'
Joint, joint, joint, joint
Don't stop it, stop it, stop it, stop it
Rollin', rollin', roillin', rollin'
We still smokin', smokin', smokin', smokin'
